changelog:
• Added a new Universal API that connects all execution modules together and provides more efficient runtime methods.
• A new Attachment Bridge — a bridge that updates status progressively as events occur.
• Monaco LSP — the editor now includes an integrated Lua language server that runs on localhost and continuously tracks events in the code, updating hints and other global function types.
• Maded some optimization improvements.
• Fixed Auto-Attach for VelocityAPI.
• Fixed AutoExec Support for MadiumAPI.
 [THIS UPDATE REQUIRES TO USE SE-INSTALLER TO UPDATE ALL FILES CORRECTLY]
